violations.description: Video player buttons (⏮, ▶, ⏭, 1x, 🔊, ⛶) have no aria-labels. Screen readers cannot identify control purposes.
violations.reference_fix:
<button class="vc-btn" aria-label="Previous lesson">⏮</button>
<button class="vc-btn" aria-label="Play">▶</button>
<button class="vc-btn" aria-label="Next lesson">⏭</button>

violations.description: Video progress bar is a div with no role='slider', aria-valuenow, aria-valuemin, or aria-valuemax. Not operable by assistive technology.
violations.reference_fix: <div class="vc-bar" role="slider" aria-label="Video progress" aria-valuenow="25" aria-valuemin="0" aria-valuemax="100" tabindex="0">

violations.description: Action buttons (Like, Download, Notes, Share, Report) are <div> elements, not <button>. Not keyboard-focusable or operable.
Tab interface uses div elements without role='tablist', role='tab', aria-selected, or aria-controls. The tab pattern is not accessible to keyboard or screen reader users.
Module headers are divs acting as accordion toggles without <button>, aria-expanded, or aria-controls attributes.
Lesson items are clickable divs that cannot be reached via keyboard. They need to be links or buttons with proper roles.
violations.reference_fix: ✓ Welcome & Setup 5:20

page_description: An online course viewer with video player, custom controls, action buttons, tab interface, and sidebar lesson navigation. Multiple ARIA pattern violations across video controls, tabs, accordion modules, and interactive lesson items.
